context_of_use: Deterministic synthetic engineering QA for ECG R-peak detection and observable R-R interval reconstruction under controlled acquisition disturbances.

truth_policy.rr_definition: Difference between consecutive present-QRS construction R-peak times inside the record.
truth_policy.first_beat: Excluded because no preceding in-record R peak is observable.
truth_policy.artifact_overlap: Retained for RR scoring; signal-quality/HRV exclusion policy does not remove physiological RR truth.

evidence_boundary: Synthetic engineering evidence only; not FDA qualification, clinical validation, diagnostic performance evidence, or a substitute for sponsor-specific risk analysis and representative clinical data.
